title: Xloff horn
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Xloff horn''' was a small, flat [[Music/Legends|musical]] horn used as part of a [[Bontormian klesplong/Legends|Bontormian klesplong]].<ref name="CVD">''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary, New Edition]]''</ref>
